scripts.dev: concurrently "yarn workspace @eco_wheel/api start:dev" "yarn workspace @eco_wheel/frontend dev" "yarn workspace @eco_wheel/admin start"
scripts.migrate: npx prisma generate --schema=./api/prisma/schema.prisma&&npx prisma db push --schema=./api/prisma/schema.prisma&&npx ts-node ./api/prisma/seeds
